metadata.description: Sun* Annual Awards 2025 — Celebrating outstanding talent and contributions.

errors.oauth_init_failed: Could not start Google sign-in. Please try again.

kudosBanner.heading: Sun* Kudos
kudosBanner.label: New in SAA 2025
kudosBanner.body: Recognizing and thanking colleagues — held for the very first time for all Sunners. Launching in November 2025, it encourages Sun* people to share words of recognition and thanks for colleagues on the system announced by the organizers. This will serve as reference material for the Heads Council during the award selection process.

community.title: Community Standards
community.intro: Community Standards are built to ensure a civilized, safe and positive environment for everyone taking part in the Sun* Kudos recognition and appreciation movement.
community.warning: Any content found to match one of the violation criteria below will be labeled as Spam and proactively hidden by the system.
criteria: Using profane or vulgar language, or content that is offensive or defamatory.
Mentioning political, religious, or gender-discrimination matters.
Containing specific figures (revenue, contracts, KPIs, customers, project codes, account numbers, etc.).
Mentioning the names of partners, customers, or external organizations.
Containing personal information (email, phone number, address, family details).
Repeatedly sending 3+ messages with similar content within a short time.
Kudos content that is too short (under 30 characters) with no context.
Sending to too many people/groups within a short time (<3s per message).
Spam wording (containing only characters such as "!", "...", or characters with no content).
An abnormal spike in the number of "hearts" (relative to average user behavior).

security.title: Security Standards
security.lead: Sunners are committed to protecting information. Every member is responsible for keeping content shared on the system confidential.

infoSecurity.label: Information Security
infoSecurity.text: All information shared by Sunners is kept confidential within the system.

sharingScope.label: Sharing Scope
sharingScope.text: All personnel and project information in the system is confidential. Sunners, please share only within Sun*.

security.support: For any questions, Sunners please contact the SAA organizing committee representative: Slack duong.thi.thuy.an for support.

receivers.heading: KUDOS RECIPIENTS: HERO BADGES FOR POSITIVE INFLUENCE
receivers.intro: Based on the number of teammates who have sent you Kudos, you earn a matching Hero badge, displayed right next to your profile name.

tiers.desc: The journey of spreading good things begins — the first thank-yous and recognitions have found their way to you.
Your image is growing in your teammates' hearts through your kindness and dedication.
You have become a trusted and beloved symbol — someone always ready to help and remembered by many teammates.

tiers.range: Over 20 people have sent you Kudos
tiers.desc: You have become a legend — leaving an unforgettable mark on the team through your heart and your actions.

senders.heading: KUDOS SENDERS: COLLECT ALL 6 ICONS, GET A MYSTERY GIFT
senders.body: Every Kudos you send is posted to the system and earns ❤ from the Sunner community. For every 5 ❤, you unlock 1 Secret Box for a chance at one of SAA's 6 exclusive icons.
senders.footnote: Sunners who collect all 6 icons receive a mystery gift from SAA 2025.

national.heading: NATIONAL KUDOS
national.body: The 5 Kudos with the most ❤ across Sun* officially become National Kudos and receive a special gift from SAA 2025: Root Further.
